title: PDB3D's Historical Paintings [16x]
description: Resource pack replacing all the paintings in the game with historical paintings
body:
![Self Portrait by Vincent van Gogh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09377b0cccdf1940e65b73fdb41019770b48b6d4.png)

Replaces the vanilla paintings with historical paintings, Downscaled and edited to have correct shapes. uses the same resolution as the vanilla paintings, ensuring it will fit with vanilla or any other 16x16 resource pack also replaces the names and description of the painting items. A Great resource pack to use when you want to build a museum!

![All Paintings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44cb9abf668a91a0e9c6f37167fe83ce71b28f00_0.webp)

Paintings added:

- A Garland of Flowers - Michaelina Wautier (1604-1689)
- Alice - Henry Tanworth Wells (1828-1903)
- Barge Haulers on the Volga - Ilya Repin (1844-1930)
- Commodore the Honourable August Kepp - Joshua Reynolds (1723-1792)
- Composition with Red, Blue and Yellow - Piet Mondrian (1872-1944)
- Flaming June - Lord Frederick Leighton (1830-1896)
- Hambletonian, Rubbing Down - George Stubbs (1724-1806)
- Japanese Footbridge - Claude Monet (1840-1926)
- Las Meninas - Diego Velázquez (1599-1660)
- Liberty Leading the People - Eugène Delacroix (1798-1863)
- Mona Lisa - Leonardo da Vinci (1452-1519)
- Napoleon Crossing the Alps on 20th May 1800 - Jacques-Louis David (1748-1825)
- Portrait of a Man with a Glove - Frans Hals (1582-1666)
- Portrait of Genghis Khan - Unknown Author
- Red Balloon - Paul Klee (1879-1940)
- Scottish Highlands - Henry Bates Joel (1875-1922)
- Self-Portrait with Grey Felt Hat - Vincent van Gogh (1853-1890)
- Starry Night - Vincent van Gogh (1853-1890)
- Stacks of Wheat (End of Summer) - Claude Monet (1840-1926)
- Still Life: Vase with Fourteen Sunflowers - Vincent van Gogh (1853-1890)
- Storm on the Sea of Galilee - Kristoffer Zetterstrand
- The Annunciation - Leonardo da Vinci (1452-1519)
- The Creation of Adam - Michelangelo (1475-1564)
- The Fighting Temeraire, tugged to her last berth to be broken up - William Turner (1775-1851)
- The Garden of Earthly Delights - Hieronymus Bosch (1450-1516)
- The Girl with a Pearl Earring - Johannes Vermeer (1632-1675)
- The Great Wave off Kanagawa - Katsushika Hokusai (1760-1849)
- The Knight and the Maiden - Richard Bergh (1858-1919)
- The Landing of Jan van Riebeeck - Sir Charles Bell (1774-1842)
- The Last Day of Pompeii - Karl Bryullov (1799-1852)
- The Last Supper - Leonardo da Vinci (1452-1519)
- The Laughing Cavalier - Frans Hals (1582-1666)
- The Milkmaid - Johannes Vermeer (1632-1675)
- The Monarch of the Glen - Sir Edwin Henry Landseer (1802-1873)
- The Night Café - Vincent van Gogh (1853-1890)
- The Night Watch - Rembrandt van Rijn (1606-1669)
- The Ninth Wave - Ivan Konstantinovich Aivazovsky (1817-1900)
- The Oath of the Horatii - Jacques-Louis David (1748-1825)
- The Polar Sea (The Sea of Ice) - Caspar David Friedrich (1774-1840)
- The Scream - Edvard Munch (1863-1944)
- The Sleeping Venus - Giorgio Barbarelli da Castelfranco (1477-1510)
- The Tower of Babel - Pieter Bruegel the Elder (1525-1569)
- The Wanderer Above a Sea of Mist - Caspar David Friedrich (1774-1840)
- Vädersolstavlan - Urban Målare (?-?, 16th century)
- View of Toledo - El Greco (1541-1614)
- Water Lilies - Claude Monet (1840-1926)
